posts.title: Lakeflow Spark Declarative Pipelines: your first declarative data pipeline, step by step
posts.excerpt: Build a complete Bronze → Silver → Gold medallion pipeline with the new pipelines API, expectations included — fully runnable on Databricks Free Edition.

posts.title: Delta Lake internals you can poke at: the transaction log, deletion vectors, liquid clustering and time travel
posts.excerpt: One table, four internals: replay the transaction log, watch deletion vectors make DELETE instant, verify liquid clustering prunes files, and learn what VACUUM really destroys.

posts.title: Fine-grained governance with Unity Catalog: row filters, column masks and dynamic views
posts.excerpt: Three mechanisms that look alike and behave very differently — built on a salary table you can lock down (and unlock) solo, on Databricks Free Edition.

posts.title: Auto Loader and schema evolution: bulletproof bronze ingestion
posts.excerpt: Trigger every failure mode on purpose — new columns, bad types, re-runs — and watch Auto Loader evolve, rescue and never lose a row, all on a UC Volume.
